events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Aura Kai notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Luna Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Ora Flame notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Nova Sol wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Echo Vale whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
